reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención de los playeros y de las chicas del comedor, el comedor está muy bueno y las comidas bien ricas !! Lo único que no tienen para pagar con la app de YPF!! Todo lo demás excelente!!

The service from the beach attendants and the cafeteria staff was excellent. The dining room was very nice, and the food was delicious! The only thing they didn't offer was the YPF app. Everything else was excellent!

reviews.comment:
Una linda estación de servicio sobre ruta 7, ahora un poco descuidada. No tiene la higiene de hace unos años atrás ni la cordial atención. De todos modos es amplia, cómoda con espacio para parar a descansar

(Translated by Google)
A nice gas station on Route 7, now a bit neglected. It lacks the cleanliness it had a few years ago, nor the friendly service. However, it's spacious and comfortable, with room to stop and rest.
